test.create_query: CREATE TABLE right ( k UInt64, c1 UInt64, c2 String, c3 Float64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE left ( k UInt64, v UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE right16 ( k UInt16, c1 UInt64, c2 String, c3 Float64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE left16 ( k UInt16, v UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO right SELECT number, number * 2, toString(number), number / 3 FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO left SELECT number, number / 2 FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO right16 SELECT number % 65536, number * 2, toString(number), number / 3 FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO left16 SELECT number, number / 2 FROM numbers(6553)
test.query: SELECT r.c1, r.c2, r.c3 FROM left AS l RIGHT ANTI JOIN right AS r ON r.k = l.k AND l.v >= r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT r.c1, r.c2, r.c3 FROM left AS l RIGHT JOIN right AS r ON r.k = l.k AND l.v >= r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT r.c1, r.c2, r.c3 FROM left AS l FULL JOIN right AS r ON r.k = l.k AND l.v >= r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT r.c1, r.c2, r.c3 FROM left16 AS l RIGHT ANTI JOIN right16 AS r ON r.k = l.k AND l.v >= r.k FORMAT Null
